lang.toggle.label: Language
landing.label: OpenClaw Mission Control
landing.subtitle: Track tasks, approvals, and agent health in one unified command center. Get real-time signals when work changes, without losing the thread of execution.
landing.shipWork: Ship work without losing the thread.
landing.surfaceSubtitle: Tasks, approvals, and agent status stay synced across the board.
landing.signal1: Agent Delta moved task to review
landing.feature1Desc: Keep tasks, priorities, dependencies, and ownership visible at a glance.
landing.feature2Desc: Queue, comment, and approve without losing context or slowing execution.
landing.feature3Desc: See work change as it happens: tasks, agent status, and approvals update live.
landing.feature4Desc: Every decision leaves a trail, so the board stays explainable and reviewable.
landing.ctaHeadline: Start with one board. Grow into a control room.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Onboard a board, name a lead agent, and keep approvals and signals visible from day one.
landingShell.footerTagline: A calm command center for boards, agents, and approvals.
